settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile below.
settings.helpSubtitle: How to use ChefAI, FAQ, and tips — ChefAI only.

help.pickSub: Guides and search below use the language you pick. Only this app is covered — no web browsing, no general AI answers.
help.pickFooter: ChefAI only — not medical, legal, or financial advice.

explore.title: Explore
explore.subtitle: Saved recipes, trending dishes, and recent history
explore.shoppingDesc: Pick saved recipes to auto-build ingredient lists — check items off as you shop.
explore.savedEmpty: No saved recipes yet. Save from recipe details.
explore.trendingEmpty: No trending data yet. Open more recipes to build trends.

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: Discover dishes from home cooks, like and comment, and share photos of what you made.
community.empty: No posts yet. Share a photo to get started.
community.commentsEmpty: No comments yet — be the first.
community.shareSubtitle: Show your plate to the community. Posts are saved on this device until you add cloud sync.
community.caption: Caption
community.captionPlaceholder: One line about what you cooked...
community.alertPermissionBody: Allow photo library access so you can pick a picture from your gallery.
community.alertPhotoBody: Choose a photo to share with the community.
